tweets.full_text:
even Sam Altman is confused by how education hasn't  significantly changed at all since ChatGPT came out:

"if we continue to teach students as if we were in a pre-AGI world, it's gonna lead to an atrophy of critical thinking." https://t.co/StYeDkrR94
tweets.summary: Sam Altman警告：教育体系未因ChatGPT改变，继续按前AGI时代教学将导致批判性思维萎缩。AI时代教育危机。
angles: Sam Altman发出警告：教育还在用前AGI思维教学
ChatGPT出现2年，为什么学校教育毫无改变？
AI时代的教育危机：批判性思维正在萎缩

tweets.full_text:
New Anthropic research: A global workspace in language models.

Of everything happening in your brain right now, only a tiny fraction is consciously accessible—thoughts you can describe, hold in mind, and reason with.

We found a strikingly similar divide inside Claude. https://t.co/aLUPBifxth
tweets.summary: Anthropic发布新研究：发现Claude语言模型内部存在类似人脑的全局工作空间，只有部分信息可被意识访问。
angles: Claude大脑首次解剖：发现意识工作空间
AI模型与人脑惊人相似，Anthropic新发现
语言模型的隐藏思维：全局工作空间揭秘

tweets.full_text: 𝐒𝐂𝐀𝐑𝐘: For the first time in 30 years, Nvidia will not release a gaming GPU this year due to global memory chip shortage. https://t.co/5vnaefC9Pq
tweets.summary: Nvidia 30年来首次不发布游戏GPU，原因是全球内存芯片短缺。这是芯片产业的重大事件。
angles: 30年首次！Nvidia今年不出游戏GPU
芯片荒来袭：Nvidia被迫停产游戏显卡
全球内存短缺冲击，Nvidia历史性决策

tweets.full_text:
Fable 5 probably running locally in about two years.

That is the projection in this r/LocalLLaMA chart. It tracks how long it takes for cloud-frontier capability to become broadly comparable in laptop-runnable open-weight models. The observed average lag: ~24.8 months. https://t.co/JFdWB4Xna3
tweets.summary: LocalLLaMA社区数据显示，云端前沿能力平均需24.8个月才能在开源模型中实现，预测Fable 5两年内可本地运行。
angles: 24.8个月规律：云端AI何时成为本地能力
Fable 5即将本地化运行，开源模型追赶速度加快
LocalLLaMA数据揭示：AI民主化的时间表

tweets.full_text:
ESTUDIANTE JAPONÉS HACKEA BANDAI

Un adolescente de apenas 15 años fue arrestado en Japón tras orquestar un destructivo ataque cibernético contra la reconocida plataforma de anime Bandai Channel.

Utilizando la inteligencia artificial de ChatGPT, el estudiante creó un programa https://t.co/VaoPREYhPI

tweets.full_text:
Ford fired a $200,000-a-year employee over a $1.95 cookie he paid for.

Kurt Kromm, 11 years at the Kentucky Truck Plant, felt his blood sugar drop at 3:30 a.m. He's diabetic. The kiosk flashed red on his card, so he paid at the second machine, ate the cookie, went back to
tweets.summary: 福特因员工用$1.95自付购买饼干而解雇了年薪$20万的11年员工Kurt Kromm。员工因低血糖紧急进食，却因财务系统问题遭无情处罚。

tweets.full_text: Imagine what it will be like if 5 years from now models have improved on Fable as much as Fable has improved on GPT3.
tweets.summary: Paul Graham观点：未来5年AI模型进步空间巨大，Fable相对GPT-3的改进幅度可能重复。展现AI能力天花板想象空间。
angles: 5年后AI会进步到什么程度？Paul Graham的大胆预测
从GPT-3到Fable的跨越，未来还有多少想象空间
AI天花板在哪？硅谷大佬的前沿思考

tweets.full_text: It's not a unique observation but AI is going to hit normies like a ton of bricks. The tiny minority of people maxxing out their usage of agents and Claude Fable can see it and it's driving us all insane. Normies think it will never get beyond writing boilerplate emails
tweets.summary: 观点：AI能力差距正在扩大，深度用户（agents/Claude）已看到未来，普通人仍认为AI只能写邮件。认知鸿沟加剧。
angles: AI认知鸿沟：深度用户vs普通人的平行世界
为什么有人已看到AI未来，大多数人还在写邮件
Agents和Claude的真实能力，普通人永远不会知道

tweets.full_text: If you want to start a startup, don't learn "entrepreneurship." Learn how to build things. The hard part of startups is not "entrepreneurship" but product: to know what to build, and to be able to build it.
tweets.summary: Paul Graham建议创业者学习产品构建而非创业学，强调产品能力是创业的核心难点。
